name: riptide
desc: A polished terminal internet speed test and realtime bandwidth monitor written in Go. Riptide measures download, upload, and latency in a centered card UI with…
descFull: A polished terminal internet speed test and realtime bandwidth monitor written in Go. Riptide measures download, upload, and latency in a centered card UI with live progress, compact sparklines, smooth animation, and clean cross-platform output for Linux and Windows terminals.
